name: CUDC-907
description: CUDC-907 has been used in trials studying the treatment of Lymphoma, Solid Tumors, BREAST CANCER, Multiple Myeloma, and NUT Midline Carcinoma, among others.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with CUDC-907.
